$comment: Place this at <central-config>/projects/<repo-dir>/grooming.json (the central config tree, OUTSIDE the repo). The loaders resolve it by repo basename via $ORCHESTRATOR_CONFIG_DIR / --config-dir / a host-aware default (a config/ dir beside the projects root: dev <repo>/../config, prod <repo>/../../config); pass --manifest <path> to override the full path, or --project <key> to override the dir name. The invariant grooming procedure lives in the skill; this file carries the per-repo specifics. notion_env + source_root + packages are repo-relative (resolved against --repo, not the manifest location). The .skill-cache/grooming/<milestone>/ + .skill-cache/design/<milestone>/ caches stay under the repo (gitignored).
$backend: notion | jira | github-issues | yaml — which task backend this repo uses.
$architectural_control: full = you own the design docs and resolve/rewrite. low = you are one contributor; the skill reads reference/low-control.md and biases to investigate-propose-route.
$source_root: Repo-relative root the `packages` keys are resolved under.
$integration_branch: LOCAL branch used as the code-freshness baseline. Local (not origin) so it stays a frozen anchor during a grooming session even while implementation sessions push to origin.
$notion_env: Path to a .env carrying NOTION_API_KEY, passed through to the loader's sibling scripts. Omit for non-Notion backends.
$status_vocab: Your board's exact status names. backlog = needs grooming; done = work complete; deferred = scope superseded by another task (NOT 'do later') — treated equivalently to done by /groom and /design (not surfaced, satisfied for dep purposes).
$context_pages: The fixed Step-1 context loads (master context, research goals, architecture, coding + task-writing guidelines, milestones). Bodies are fetched into the cache so the session reads from disk, not by hand.
$milestones: Per-milestone board id + immediate neighbour boards (loaded context-only to catch cross-milestone dependencies).
$packages: Code-region keying granularity, relative to source_root. Longest match wins. Coarser (package/dir) is better than file-level: it survives small edits and lets stubbed tasks that name an area still resolve. Split a large package finer where useful.
$area_aliases: Map human area phrases used in stubbed tasks ('phase deriver') to a package path. Fill in as real aliases emerge — a wrong alias is worse than none, so leave unknown areas out; the loader flags unresolved tasks for the skill's judgment pass.
